name: Real-Time KPI Dashboard Feed
description: Feeds every Atlas call disposition, Buffer publish event, and Airtable status change to a real-time KPI dashboard tracking Section 3.5 metrics.

config.description: Classify event type and extract KPI data
config.code: const eventType = inputData.source; let kpiData = {}; if (eventType === 'atlas_disposition') { kpiData = { metric: 'call_disposition', outcome: inputData.disposition, agent: inputData.agent, zone: inputData.zone, segment: inputData.segment, connected: inputData.connected === 'true', booked: inputData.booked === 'true', investor_flagged: inputData.investor_flag === 'true' }; } else if (eventType === 'buffer_publish') { kpiData = { metric: 'content_published', platform: inputData.platform, pillar: inputData.pillar }; } else { kpiData = { metric: 'status_change', table: inputData.table, old_status: inputData.old_status, new_status: inputData.new_status }; } kpiData.timestamp = new Date().toISOString(); output = kpiData;
